'''Jes Flon''' was [[Jowart Typok]]'s follower and [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of [[Jes Flon's smuggling ship|his stock light freighter]] for [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] ivory. She wore a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] in a shoulder holster at all times. When Typok came back to the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] after a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] had wounded him, she immediately lifted the ship off, though she was eventually shot down by the group of Rebels.
